amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 3 — paragraph 1 — point 33 a (new)
parliament_text:
(33a) ‘biometric-based data’ means data resulting from specific technical processing relating to physical, physiological or behavioural signals of a natural person;

‘biometric-based data’ means data resulting from specific technical processing relating to physical, physiological or behavioural signals of a natural person;
